flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at John A Logan College rose 24% between 2015 and 2018 ($2.5k → $3.1k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at John A Logan College fell 15% between 2006 and 2009 (26.5% → 22.4%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at John A Logan College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (8.6% → 0.0%).
